theme_and_archetype.archetype: 1 (Organic & Earthy) mixed with Swiss Grid Structural Density
theme_and_archetype.vibe: Trusted, structured, warm luxury, enterprise-grade, grounded in Gujarat context. No generic tech-blue or purple.

dashboard.grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 sm:gap-6

buttons.primary: bg-[#C25934] text-white hover:bg-[#A64A2A] px-6 py-2.5 rounded-none sm:rounded-sm text-sm font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#1A1A1A] text-[#1A1A1A] hover:bg-[#1A1A1A] hover:text-[#F9F6F0] px-6 py-2.5 rounded-none sm:rounded-sm text-sm font-medium transition-colors
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-[#5C5A55] hover:bg-[#F0EFEA] hover:text-[#1A1A1A] px-4 py-2 rounded-sm text-sm transition-colors

inputs.default: bg-white border border-[#E6E4DF] text-[#1A1A1A] px-4 py-2.5 rounded-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#C25934] focus:border-[#C25934] text-sm

badges.hot: bg-[#D9423E]/10 text-[#D9423E] border border-[#D9423E]/20 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium
badges.warm: bg-[#D97B29]/10 text-[#D97B29] border border-[#D97B29]/20 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium
badges.cold: bg-[#3E7B7A]/10 text-[#3E7B7A] border border-[#3E7B7A]/20 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium

tables.header: border-b border-[#E6E4DF] text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-[#8A8782] pb-3

hero_marketing.description: High-end two-story house with glass windows and balconies, warm tone

texture_background.description: Gandhinagar stone carvings (use at 5-10% opacity as a texture background in marketing section)

login_side_image.description: Abstract low-angle photography of a modern concrete building

client_meeting.description: Real estate professionals shaking hands with client

icons.usage: Use icons sparingly. Use them primarily in the dashboard sidebar, stat cards, and as micro-indicators in the data table.

motion_and_interactions.hover_state: All interactive elements must shift visually. Buttons change background color, cards lift slightly (-translate-y-1) and gain subtle border emphasis.
motion_and_interactions.reduced_motion: Ensure all animations respect prefers-reduced-motion media query.
motion_and_interactions.dashboard_charts: Charts should fade in gently. No bouncy animations. Keep it strictly professional.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install the required fonts via Google Fonts in index.html: <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cabinet+Grotesk:wght@400;500;700&family=IBM+Plex+Sans:wght@400;500;600&family=IBM+Plex+Mono&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
Use raw HTML/Tailwind for the Marketing and Login pages to ensure bespoke layouts. Use Shadcn extensively for the Dashboard (Tables, Cards, Dropdowns).
Ensure the Dashboard is data-dense. Don't add excessive padding inside widgets. Use the 1px border approach ('border-[#E6E4DF]') instead of heavy drop shadows.
The primary accent color is Terracotta (#C25934). Use it for primary CTA buttons, active states, and focus rings. Do NOT use standard Tailwind blue, indigo, or purple anywhere.
For the Leads table, implement the AI Lead Score badges exactly as defined in the colors.status section.
All interactive elements MUST have role-based data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid="login-submit-button", data-testid="nav-dashboard-link").

Marketing Hero Overlay: If layering text over the hero image, use a gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-r from-[#F9F6F0] via-[#F9F6F0]/80 to-transparent) rather than a flat black box to maintain the light theme.
